title: TicklemonSMP
description: TicklemonSMP's very own custom modpack, adding different QOL and content mods onto the Official Cobblemon Modpack.
body:
This modpack includes everything a player might need in their Cobblemon journey that hasn't been added in the base modpack such as, 
- Backpacks
- Furniture & Decoration
- Rideable Mons
- & Much more

This modpack is **required** if you wish to join and play on the TicklemonSMP Cobblemon server. However this modpack can also be used in singleplayer if you wish to do so.
